member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.DoarConfigurationProvider
member.summary: This is the Doar SaS configuration provider that map the current tenant to their configuration.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.DoarConfigurationProvider.Instance
member.summary: Gets the default instance of the object.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.IKeyVaultConfigurationManager
member.summary: Loads and managed the configuration from Azure Key Vault for each Tenant.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.IKeyVaultConfigurationManager.EnsureTenantConfigurationLoaded(System.Int32,BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.TenantConfiguration.Options.TenantDevelopmentOptions)
member.summary: Ensure that the secrets for the tenant are loaded in runtime.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.IKeyVaultConfigurationManager.GetTenantConfiguration(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the specific tenant configuration that has more priority that normal configuration.
member.returns: A dictionary with the configuration for the tenant.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.IKeyVaultConfigurationManager.LoadTenantConfiguration
member.summary: Loads all the configuration from the Azure Key Vaults.
member.returns: True if the configuration is loaded, false otherwise.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.IKeyVaultConfigurationManager.GetLastLoadDiagnostics
member.summary: Gets diagnostics for the most recent failed call.
member.returns: Diagnostics when the last load failed; otherwise null.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultAuthenticationFailureHelper
member.summary: Helpers for Azure AD / Key Vault authentication failures.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultAuthenticationFailureHelper.IsAuthenticationFailure(System.Exception)
member.summary: Determines whether an exception represents an Azure authentication failure.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultAuthenticationFailureHelper.BuildServicePrincipalDiagnostics(System.Exception,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultServicePrincipalSettings)
member.summary: Builds diagnostics for a tenant service principal authentication failure.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics
member.summary: Describes why tenant Key Vault configuration failed to load.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.Stage
member.summary: Gets or sets the failure stage identifier.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.Message
member.summary: Gets or sets the human-readable failure summary.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.EnvironmentName
member.summary: Gets or sets the ASP.NET Core environment name.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.SasCoreVaultUri
member.summary: Gets or sets the SAS core Key Vault URI that was contacted.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.CredentialMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the credential type used to access Key Vault.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.ExceptionType
member.summary: Gets or sets the exception type name when available.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.ExceptionMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the exception message when available.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.TenantName
member.summary: Gets or sets the tenant name related to the failure, when applicable.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.TenantVaultUri
member.summary: Gets or sets the tenant Key Vault URI related to the failure, when applicable.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.ApplicationInsightsHints
member.summary: Gets or sets Application Insights search hints.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.ServicePrincipalSecretKeyName
member.summary: Gets or sets the SAS core secret key that stores the service principal connection string.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.AzureAdClientId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Azure AD application (client) id involved in the failure.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationLoadDiagnostics.RemediationSteps
member.summary: Gets or sets remediation steps for operators.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultConfigurationManager
member.summary: This class loads and managed the configuration from Azure Key Vault for each Tenant.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A reference to the infrastructure context.

member.summary: Parsed service principal settings used to access a tenant Key Vault.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Azure AD tenant id.

member.summary: Gets or sets the application (client) id.

member.summary: Gets or sets the client secret value.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultServicePrincipalSettings.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a semicolon-delimited service principal connection string.
member.param: Connection string from SAS core Key Vault.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.ConfigurationProvider.KeyVaultServicePrincipalSettings.LooksLikeSecretIdentifier(System.String)
member.summary: Detects when a client secret looks like a secret identifier instead of the secret value.
member.returns: True when the value resembles an Azure secret id.

member.summary: Get the extended tenant properties from the database.
member.remarks: This is a separate method because we can't resolve this at the same time.
member.returns: A with the tenant specific configuration.
